description: Remove doom.nix, the Doom chemacs profiles (default/doom/doom-dev), the Doom activation action (git clone), emacs.org, and Doom-specific dependencies (ripgrep force, binutils, gnutls, editorconfig-core-c). Clean up common.org to remove any blocks only used by Doom. Update emacs-config.nix to only handle vanilla (or remove if no longer needed).
title: Remove Doom Emacs config
